title: Winnipeg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap hits Winnipeg with a Z-Score of -3.77. Temperatures are extremely low, scoring 10.0/10 in severity.
body:
The current cold snap in Winnipeg has brought temperatures down significantly, with a Z-Score of -3.77 indicating a rare and extreme event.
The city is experiencing a critical level of cold, with 14.2 GG of Heating Degree Days (HDD) and no Cooling Degree Days (CDD).
Humidity is at 64% and winds are blowing at 19.1 km/h, adding to the harsh conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency cold snap protocols immediately.
